25% de impuesto a las utilidades empresa: 25% corporate income tax (IUE). No capital gains tax on reinvested profits. Stable tax framework with clear regulations.

¿Qué necesita una empresa extranjera par: What does a foreign company need to operate in Bolivia?
Ya sea que abras una sucursal o constitu: Whether you open a branch or incorporate a new entity, the regulatory path is the same — and Otium manages every step.
Sucursal o nueva sociedad (SRL/SA). Eval: Branch or new entity (SRL/SA). We assess your activity, partners and goals to recommend the right structure.
Los documentos societarios extranjeros (: Foreign corporate documents (articles, powers of attorney) must be apostilled and translated. We coordinate the entire process.
Registro de comercio ante el Servicio Pl: Commercial registry with the Plurinational Service of Commerce Registry. Mandatory before any other step.
Inscripción en el Servicio de Impuestos: Registration with Bolivia's National Tax Service, including selection of the applicable tax regime.
Bolivia utiliza facturación electrónica: Bolivia uses mandatory electronic invoicing. We set up your system so you can bill from day one.
IVA mensual, impuesto corporativo (IUE),: Monthly VAT (IVA), corporate tax (IUE), payroll (AFP/CNS) and financial reporting — managed by our team.

¿Puede una empresa 100% extranjera opera: Can a fully foreign-owned company operate in Bolivia?
Sí. Bolivia permite la propiedad extranj: Yes. Bolivia allows 100% foreign ownership of commercial entities (SRL or SA). No local partner is required, though you will need a local legal representative with a Bolivian ID for certain filings with the SIN and SEPREC.
¿Necesito una oficina física en Bolivia?: Do I need a physical office in Bolivia?
Se requiere un domicilio legal registrad: A registered legal address is required for SEPREC and SIN registration. Otium can advise on cost-effective solutions depending on your operational model.
¿Otium puede comunicarse en inglés o por: Can Otium communicate in English or Portuguese?
Sí. Nuestro equipo trabaja en español, i: Yes. Our team works in Spanish, English and Portuguese. Reports, dashboards and day-to-day communications can be delivered in your preferred language.
¿Cuánto tiempo toma la instalación compl: How long does the full setup take?
La constitución de la empresa toma aprox: Company incorporation takes approximately 20 business days once all documents are ready. Tax registration and invoicing are configured immediately after. We provide a detailed timeline in the initial proposal.
¿Qué obligaciones recurrentes tiene mi e: What ongoing obligations does my company have in Bolivia?
Monthly: IVA and IT declarations. Annually: IUE (corporate income tax) return. If you have employees: monthly AFP and CNS social security contributions. Otium manages all these obligations as part of our outsourcing services.
